entity.label: Conaniah
entity.subtitle: Male
entity.description: Whom Jehovah hath set, a Levite placed over the tithes brought into the temple (2 Chr. 35:9).

nodes.label: Conaniah
nodes.description: Whom Jehovah hath set, a Levite placed over the tithes brought into the temple (2 Chr. 35:9).

verses.text: Conaniah also, and Shemaiah and Nethaneel, his brethren, and Hashabiah and Jeiel and Jozabad, chief of the Levites, gave unto the Levites for passover offerings five thousand small cattle, and five hundred oxen.
